mechanics.excerpt: 84) for all the skills in the Clan Fighter Pilot Field In addition all pilots have the G-Tolerance and Glass Jaw traits (below) at no Character Point cost/value G-TOLERANCE Cost: character with this trait is especially resistant t0 the stress of high G maneuvering, most often found in fighter craft and accelerating /decelerating Drop Ships All target numbers that relate to the effects of high gravity have -2 TN modifier for G-Tolerant characters_ EXCEPTIONAL ATTRIBUTE (multiple tralt) Cost: This entitles the character to have one Attribute point higher than the maximum listed his phenotype (see the Attribute Maximums Table maximums attainable through this trait are shown in parentheses) Note this trait only increas es the maximum_ not the Attribute itself or the Attribute thresh old.
